---
name: '💡 Feature Request'
about: Suggest an expansion to the Sandbox UI, tooling, or architectural ecosystem.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🤔 Is your request related to a specific friction point?

_A clear and concise description of the limitation or problem you are encountering. (e.g., "It's difficult to track the exact momentum of a particle because the Properties Panel only updates on click.")_

## 🌟 Proposed Solution

_Describe the architecture, UI addition, or engine tweak you would like to see implemented. (e.g., "Add a real-time tracking graph for specific object properties, utilizing the `MakieGraph` component.")_

## ⚖️ Alternatives Considered

_Did you attempt to work around this limitation using existing tools? Have you considered alternative architectural approaches?_

## 📊 Mockups / Additional Context

_If suggesting a UI change, a quickly drawn mockup or wireframe is incredibly helpful. Add any other relevant context here._
